circulars.title: MPD Circular No. 01/2026 - Repo Rate Reduction
circulars.summary: Bangladesh Bank reduced the repo rate by 50bps to 8.50%, citing declining inflation trajectory and adequate banking sector liquidity.

circulars.title: Monetary Policy Statement - January-June 2026
circulars.summary: BB signaled continued easing bias with focus on supporting economic recovery while monitoring inflation expectations.

circulars.title: MPD Circular No. 04/2025 - CRR Maintained at 4.00%
circulars.summary: CRR maintained at 4.00% to preserve system liquidity while monitoring credit growth trends.
